Home.title: Unlock USDC from your creator token.
Home.subtitle: Creator tokens are sold at opening. Realized USDC secures senior lenders, while junior underwriters cover capped synthetic upside.
Home.riskTitle: A capped synthetic is not guaranteed redemption.
Home.factDelta: Sale proceeds measured by balance delta
Home.factCap: Explicit coverage cap and settlement paths
Home.illustrativeRisk: If full buyback costs more than the coverage cap, the borrower must top up or accept a partial capped settlement.
Home.waterfall: Liquidity with an explicit risk waterfall.
Home.borrowText: Your creator tokens are sold at opening. The realized USDC is isolated as position reserve before a senior loan is originated.
Home.lendText: Supply native USDC on Base and earn borrower interest, with withdrawals constrained by actually available liquidity.
Home.underwriteText: Junior capital earns premium and downside PnL, while accepting defined losses if creator tokens appreciate.
Home.riskText: Liquidity can disappear. Smart contracts can fail. Junior capital can be lost. The protocol exposes the cap, debt, settlement route and maximum top-up before signing.

Footer.description: Capped synthetic exposure for creator-token holders. Testnet only. No capital or redemption is guaranteed.

PublicPages.docsIntro: MuseLend separates realized sale reserves, senior debt and junior capped coverage. This interface documents the intended V1; deployed contracts remain the authoritative implementation.
PublicPages.docsOpeningBody: Creator tokens are transferred and sold atomically through a typed adapter. Net USDC is measured from the actual balance delta and isolated by position before any senior loan is originated.
PublicPages.docsInterestBody: Senior debt uses a high-precision borrow index and debt shares. The utilization curve has a kink and an on-chain maximum APR used for worst-case maturity checks.
PublicPages.docsSettlementBody: A borrower may repay and buy back the full token amount within the coverage cap, add a bounded top-up, or accept an exact-input capped settlement returning the amount the market can provide.
PublicPages.docsDefaultBody: After maturity and grace, anyone may settle. The sale reserve pays senior debt with priority; the synthetic right expires and unused junior coverage is released.
PublicPages.riskIntro: MuseLend is experimental smart-contract infrastructure. Testnet operation is not evidence that mainnet use is safe or legally available.
PublicPages.riskLiquidityBody: Prices can move sharply and liquidity can disappear. Buybacks can fail, require top-up, or return fewer tokens under capped settlement.
PublicPages.riskSyntheticBody: The position is time-limited and covered only up to K. It is not guaranteed redemption, protected capital or an uncapped 1:1 claim.
PublicPages.riskTranchesBody: Senior lenders face smart-contract, USDC, Base, integration, liquidity and accounting risk. Junior underwriters can lose up to the capital allocated to an epoch.
PublicPages.riskDependenciesBody: The protocol depends on Base, native USDC, Zora token validation and allowlisted swap venues. A failure or change in any dependency may pause openings or leave settlement pending.
PublicPages.riskAdminBody: Emergency roles may pause new risk but cannot take protected reserves. Non-emergency parameter and adapter changes require the deployed one-day timelock.
PublicPages.termsIntro: Draft product copy for testnet evaluation only. Final terms require independent legal approval before any mainnet activation.
PublicPages.termsTestnetBody: The current product is intended for Base Sepolia testing. Tokens and balances displayed may have no economic value.
PublicPages.termsGuaranteeBody: Nothing in this interface promises yield, redemption, capital protection, availability or fitness for a particular purpose.
PublicPages.termsResponsibilityBody: Users remain responsible for wallet security, transaction review, applicable law and understanding every disclosed risk.
PublicPages.privacyIntro: Draft privacy information pending legal review. The product is designed to minimize personal data and use wallet-based access.
PublicPages.privacyCategoriesBody: Public wallet addresses, protocol events, risk acknowledgements, legal-acceptance versions, technical logs and optional notification settings may be processed.
PublicPages.privacyAuthorityBody: Public blockchain activity cannot be deleted by MuseLend. Off-chain data is not authoritative for balances, debt or ownership.
PublicPages.privacyRightsBody: A verified privacy contact and jurisdiction-specific rights process must be added before launch.
PublicPages.cookiesIntro: MuseLend intends to use only essential storage by default. Analytics and optional cookies remain disabled until consent and legal review are implemented.
PublicPages.cookiesEssentialBody: Security nonces, wallet-session state, locale and consent choices may require essential cookies or local storage.
PublicPages.cookiesAnalyticsBody: No non-essential analytics should load before the required consent mechanism is active.
PublicPages.statusIntro: The application and protocol pass local and CI verification. All testnet contracts are deployed and exact-match verified; managed web infrastructure remains pending.
PublicPages.statusWebBody: Production build, unit tests, accessibility checks and local-chain lifecycle E2E pass · Vercel deployment pending account authentication
PublicPages.statusContractsBody: 11 contracts deployed at block 44,078,371 · 33/33 successful receipts · exact-match verified on Sourcify · one-day timelock active
PublicPages.statusDataBody: Schema and direct on-chain fallback are implemented · managed persistence is not provisioned
PublicPages.statusMainnetBody: Disabled · independent audit, legal review and all launch gates remain incomplete
PublicPages.maintenanceIntro: New product actions are paused while operators investigate or deploy a reviewed release. No wallet transaction should be requested from this page.
PublicPages.maintenanceFundsBody: The blockchain remains authoritative. Existing contracts are not controlled by this website maintenance switch.
PublicPages.maintenanceUpdatesBody: Use the public status, risk and legal pages while the application and transactional APIs are unavailable.

Admin.title: Protocol administration
Admin.description: Read roles and bounded risk state directly from Base Sepolia. Writes require the matching on-chain role and a successful wallet-specific simulation.
Admin.deploymentText: The console is fail-closed until every verified address, including RiskManager and timelock, is published.
Admin.configText: PositionManager, Creator Token, adapter and timelock addresses must all come from the verified deployment manifest.
Admin.connectText: Role checks are performed directly against the deployed AccessControl contracts.
Admin.networkText: Switch to Base Sepolia. Mainnet administrative actions are disabled.
Admin.simulationHelp: Every enabled write is simulated with the connected account before the wallet receives a request.
Admin.proposalHelp: The target call is first simulated as the timelock. Scheduling is enabled only for a verified proposer and never bypasses the minimum delay.
Admin.marketHelp: All existing risk limits and canonical version are preserved from the deployed config.

Shared.reviewWallet: Review the request in your wallet
Shared.replacement: Wallet replacement detected: {reason}. The hash above is the canonical replacement transaction.
Shared.errorRejected: The wallet request was rejected. No state changed.
Shared.errorGas: The wallet does not have enough ETH for network gas.
Shared.errorRevert: The transaction reverted during simulation or execution. No successful state change was recorded.
Shared.errorGeneric: The wallet transaction failed. Review the wallet details and try again.

Borrow.title: Open a capped creator-token position
Borrow.description: Quotes are based on an executed sale, never on market cap or an unverified spot price.
Borrow.sale: The Creator Token will be sold when the position opens.
Borrow.reserve: USDC from the sale will remain locked in the position.
Borrow.loan: You will receive a separate USDC loan from the Senior Vault.
Borrow.cap: Synthetic exposure is covered only up to the displayed cap.
Borrow.topUp: Above the cap, you may need to add USDC to recover the full amount.
Borrow.partial: Alternatively, you may receive fewer Creator Tokens.
Borrow.default: On default, the synthetic right is lost.
Borrow.execution: Liquidity, slippage, and fees can affect the amount received.
Borrow.economicRisk: The protocol does not eliminate the Creator Token’s economic risk.
Borrow.contractRisk: Smart contracts and integrations can fail.

AppShell.testnetNotice: Testnet interface connected to the verified Base Sepolia deployment. Test assets may have no economic value.

AppPages.overviewDescription: Positions, vault deposits, hedge epochs and activity derived from Base Sepolia.
AppPages.lendDescription: ERC-4626 shares accrue realized borrower interest. Withdrawals depend on available cash; queued claims are not instantly liquid.
AppPages.underwriteDescription: Capital is locked while positions remain exposed. Premium and downside PnL come with the risk of losing capital when creator tokens rise.
AppPages.marketsDescription: Every market is read from bounded on-chain risk configuration. Mainnet remains disabled.
AppPages.positionsDescription: Inspect debt, maturity, reserve, junior coverage and currently available settlement routes.

Claim.title: Claim your Creator Token mirror
Claim.description: Verify a canonical Creator Coin balance on Base and mint a one-time testnet mirror with exactly the same name, ticker and decimals.

ClaimPanel.selectDescription: Automatic discovery uses your connected Base wallet. You can always paste a token address manually.
ClaimPanel.notConfiguredText: Claims stay disabled until the verified Base Sepolia factory and server-only attester are published.
ClaimPanel.connectText: The same wallet must own the source balance on Base and submit the claim on Base Sepolia.
ClaimPanel.networkText: Switch to Base Sepolia before verifying and claiming.
ClaimPanel.noneDiscovered: No Creator Token balance was found. You can still enter a token address below.
ClaimPanel.discoveryUnavailable: Automatic discovery is temporarily unavailable. Manual verification remains available.
ClaimPanel.manualHelp: Only canonical Zora Creator Coins on Base (chain 8453) are accepted.
ClaimPanel.verificationFailed: The Base balance could not be verified.
ClaimPanel.claimDescription: The signed amount and metadata are checked again by the factory before minting.
ClaimPanel.capNotice: The safety cap limits this testnet claim to 1,000,000 whole tokens.
ClaimPanel.alreadyClaimedText: This wallet has already claimed this source token. The rule is enforced on-chain.
ClaimPanel.empty: Verify a source token to prepare the testnet claim.
ClaimPanel.oneTimeText: This is a one-time Base Sepolia test asset. It is not redeemable on Base, has no guaranteed value and is not automatically accepted as MuseLend collateral.
ClaimPanel.simulationFailed: The on-chain simulation failed. No transaction was sent.

LendPanel.deploymentText: No transaction is enabled until verified contract addresses are published.
LendPanel.queueDescription: Queueing transfers shares into FIFO escrow until cash returns.
LendPanel.connect: Connect a wallet to load balances and transact.

UnderwritePanel.deploymentText: Epoch transactions activate only after verified addresses are published.
UnderwritePanel.risk: Junior capital can lose value and cannot exit while linked positions remain open.

MarketsPanel.deploymentText: Markets appear only after a verified Creator Token and RiskManager are published from the deployment manifest.
MarketsPanel.loading: Reading market configuration from Base Sepolia…
MarketsPanel.disabledText: The configured Creator Token is not enabled by on-chain governance.

PositionsPanel.deploymentText: Verified Base Sepolia addresses must be published before on-chain positions can be read.
PositionsPanel.connectText: Positions are read directly from the PositionManager and filtered by the connected owner.
PositionsPanel.networkText: MuseLend testnet positions are available on chain 84532.
PositionsPanel.emptyText: Change the state filter or inspect older protocol position batches.

BorrowPanel.tokenHelp: Only canonical, enabled Zora Creator Tokens are accepted.
BorrowPanel.insufficientBalance: Amount exceeds the connected wallet balance.
BorrowPanel.simulationError: Simulation failed. Verify the epoch, liquidity, caps and quote freshness; no transaction was sent.
BorrowPanel.partialText: Above the cap, you may need to add USDC to recover the full amount. Otherwise the protocol may return fewer tokens. Liquidity, slippage and fees affect the result.
BorrowPanel.deploymentMissing: Verified Base Sepolia addresses are not published yet. The app validates inputs but cannot prepare a transaction.
BorrowPanel.integrationMissing: The verified swap adapter and interest-rate model addresses must be published before quote simulation is enabled.
BorrowPanel.tokenRejected: This token is not enabled by the protocol validator.
BorrowPanel.quoteUnavailable: No verified sell quote is available.
BorrowPanel.quoteMismatch: Quote does not match the configured adapter.
BorrowPanel.quoteReady: Fresh quote verified. Review every deduction before simulation.
BorrowPanel.quoteFailed: The quote failed safely. No transaction was prepared.

PositionDetail.contractsText: No position data or transaction is enabled without verified Base Sepolia addresses.
PositionDetail.connectText: The position is loaded directly from the connected network.
PositionDetail.networkText: Switch to Base Sepolia to inspect this position.
PositionDetail.missingText: No PositionManager record exists for this identifier.
PositionDetail.actionHelp: Full and capped buyback actions require a fresh verified swap quote and remain unavailable until the quote adapter is configured.

Settlement.title: Close position
Settlement.fullText: Buy exactly {amount} tokens. The position covers up to {cap}; you control the maximum additional USDC.
Settlement.partialText: The entire {cap} cap is exchanged. You receive only the Creator Tokens obtainable above the protected minimum.
Settlement.topUpMinimum: Maximum top-up must be at least {amount} for this slippage-protected quote.
Settlement.simulationError: Simulation failed. The transaction was not sent; refresh the quote and verify allowance and liquidity.
Settlement.quoteUnavailable: No verified settlement quote is available.
Settlement.adapterMismatch: Quote adapter does not match this position.

PositionHistory.title: Transaction history
PositionHistory.unconfigured: History activates only after the verified deployment block is published.
PositionHistory.error: On-chain history is temporarily unavailable. Position accounting above remains a direct contract read.
PositionHistory.empty: No canonical event was returned for this position.

Portfolio.contractsText: Verified Base Sepolia addresses must be published before the portfolio can be loaded.
Portfolio.connectText: Your portfolio is assembled from verified Base Sepolia contracts without custody or off-chain balances.
Portfolio.networkText: MuseLend testnet portfolio data is available on chain 84532.
Portfolio.errorText: The verified Base Sepolia RPC did not return a complete portfolio. Retry after the connection recovers.
Portfolio.emptyText: Open a capped position or allocate Base Sepolia USDC to a MuseLend vault.
Portfolio.noRecent: No owned positions in the latest protocol window.
